name: Stuck Account Alerts & Playbooks
brief: Proactive alerts when accounts stall in onboarding with recommended next actions and templates for CS/PLG.
notes: Alerts via email/Slack; rules based on no key events within X days; push tasks to Salesforce/HubSpot; medium eng effort; high demand in interviews.

name: Onboarding Funnel & Time-to-Value Dashboard
brief: Configurable funnel from signup to activation with TTV distributions and drop-off analysis.
notes: First-class TTV dashboard; compare cohorts by plan/segment; low-medium effort; broad appeal; complements north star.

name: No-Code Event Mapping Assistant
brief: Guided mapping of common events (signup, invite, first key action) using auto-detected patterns and templates.
notes: Reduces setup friction; LLM-assisted mapping; supports Segment/RudderStack and SDK; higher eng effort; major activation unlock.

name: Activation Template Library & Benchmarks
brief: Pre-built activation definitions and funnels by vertical with industry benchmarks.
notes: Fast start; reduces blank state; low effort; supports positioning; pairs with funnel.

name: CRM (Salesforce/HubSpot) Integration
brief: Sync health scores and stuck signals to CRM; create tasks/opps and surface in account pages.
notes: Critical for CS workflows; partner data model; medium eng effort; high GTM value.

name: Collaboration: Onboarding Checklist & Assignments
brief: Assign owners, due dates, and track onboarding tasks within OnboardIQ; comments and @mentions.
notes: Nice-to-have for internal coordination; medium effort; narrower reach initially.
